bizcity_twin_event_stream.purpose: Canonical event bus store for all TwinBrain + TwinCore events (R-EVT-1). One row per event_type emission; immutable append-only log.
bizcity_twin_event_stream.note: Table owned by core/twin-core (class-twin-event-store.php). Listed here for cross-reference — changes must go through core.twin-core changelog.

v1.1.0.description: Emitted when a /skill workflow pipeline begins. node_count enables FE skeleton timeline. PHASE-TWB-WORKFLOW W1.
Emitted twice per node (status=running, then status=done|error|skipped|timeout). FE updates row by idx. PHASE-TWB-WORKFLOW W1.
Emitted when pipeline finishes (success or partial failure). FE shows summary chip. PHASE-TWB-WORKFLOW W1.

history.change: Initial changelog — TwinBrain module schema baseline. References bizcity_twin_event_stream owned by core/twin-core. TAXONOMY_VERSION 6 (brain_session_* added by BS-1).

[2026-06-19 Johnny Chu] PHASE-TWB-WORKFLOW W1 — Added 3 new event_types to taxonomy: workflow_started, workflow_step, workflow_completed. Bump TAXONOMY_VERSION 6 → 7. New files: class-twinbrain-workflow-pipeline.php, core/twin-core/includes/class-twin-artifact-normalizer.php. JSON schemas: core/twin-core/event-stream/schemas/events/workflow_{started,step,completed}.json. 'twinbrain' added to allowed_sources in class-twin-event-taxonomy.php.
